title: 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers 211 211info (503) 222-5555 Alternate (503) 226-3099 Administrative Line 898211 Text Short Code Select "Foster Parent" Option 211 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Voicemail option if specialist is unavailable. FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Benefits and Services Assistance * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Case/Care Management * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child Abuse Support Groups * Foster Children Child Guidance * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child Welfare/Family Services Associations Children's Clothing * Foster Children Community Calendars * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Family Preservation Programs Foster Home Placement Foster Parent/Family Recruitment General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Mental Health Evaluation * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Parent/Child Activity Groups * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Parenting Helplines * Foster Parents Placements for Children and Youth Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Talklines/Warmlines * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Tutoring Services * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Workshops/Symposiums * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES -
